note: Full article text is not retained here or anywhere in this repository (per ER-002-S1.1 Git tracking policy). Only outlet, paraphrased headline/gist, publish date, and URL are recorded.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Meta updates its Muse Image announcement and removes the public-Instagram-reference feature
sources.paraphrased_gist: Meta officially acknowledged the feature had "missed the mark" and said it was no longer available.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Meta retreats from an AI tool criticized for using public Instagram images
sources.paraphrased_gist: Meta shut down the feature less than a week after launching Muse Image, following privacy criticism and concerns about unauthorized digital likenesses.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Meta discontinues the AI image feature after privacy backlash
sources.paraphrased_gist: The feature allowed users to create images using public Instagram accounts and faced criticism from users and SAG-AFTRA, the performers' union.

sources.paraphrased_headline: Meta removes a controversial Instagram AI function after public criticism
sources.paraphrased_gist: Users could reference public Instagram accounts by mentioning them, but the feature did not clearly alert account holders when their images were used.
